title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Unisys India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Unisys India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Unisys India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Delhi-based team.

About Unisys India:
Unisys India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Unisys India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
